title: Isolate File Server
expected_effect: Blocks attacker movement from the compromised workstation toward stored credentials.
reason: The file server sits on a high-risk path to the admin account and domain controller.

title: Disable Admin Account
expected_effect: Prevents the exposed admin identity from controlling the domain controller.
reason: The admin account has high privilege and directly controls a critical identity asset.

title: Segment Domain Controller
expected_effect: Reduces access from adjacent systems and limits movement toward mission operations.
reason: The domain controller is the highest-criticality node and grants access to critical systems.

title: Remove Stored Credentials From File Server
expected_effect: Removes the credential exposure path from the file server to the admin account.
reason: Stored credentials create a direct escalation route from normal server access to admin control.

title: Improve Monitoring on Workstation 17
expected_effect: Improves detection of suspicious commands before lateral movement succeeds.
reason: The workstation is a likely starting point for the demo attack path.
